steps.title: Start with slope-intercept form
steps.content: A linear function with slope $3$ has the form $$g(x)=3x+b.$$

steps.title: Use the point as a check
steps.content: Substituting $x=2$ into the correct answer gives $g(2)=3(2)+13=19$, exactly the given point. The other choices give $6$, $9$, or $25$ when $x=2$.
